title: [Some-Stuffs] Evangelion 3.0+1.11 - Thrice Upon a Time (BD 2160p HEVC 10-bit FLAC) v1.01 [2D918F3E] (Evangelion New Theatrical Version 𝄇 | Shin Evangelion Gekijouban 𝄇 | Rebuild of Evangelion 3.0+1.0 | 3.0+1.01)
description:
Version with fixed fonts. We decided to mark it v1.01 rather than v2 ~~to be silly~~ in hopes of making it as clear at a glance as possible that this uses the same script as the 1080p v1.
Patch available [here](https://mega.nz/file/nPA23AiK#gvXPX0-TJVjMq5FnrXwvZSJXzB8Vfg3YoGDFQG_BzDo).

-----

And of course, I made a mistake when converting the script's resolution to 4K. I initially didn't realize Aegisub's resampling feature doesn't change layoutres along with playres, so I made tweaks to the resampled TS with incorrect layoutres, but the real problem is that later on I saw the inconsistency in the metadata and made the layoutres match without accounting for how it affected the blur and, more importantly, angled signs. [Here's a quick and dirty fix with the layoutres rolled back, along with a fix for another significant TS error](https://files.catbox.moe/xh0dx3.ass) (same script is also available in my repo); a proper fix is in the works. Very sorry for the inconvenience. Having never worked with 4K before (and having not resampled TS in ages), I figured it was very likely I'd mess something up, but I'm still kicking myself over it.

Original release post follows:

-----

[Hit it!](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HS_rdaHvGP0)
Misato and WILLE's crew, rallying to put an end to it all.
Asuka and Mari, advancing in their grievously wounded Evas to put an end to it all.
Ikari Shinji, confronting his father Gendou so he can put an end to it all.
And Shinji's final decision: Farewell, all Evangelion!
~~Next time~~ RIGHT NOW, Evangelion New Theatrical Version 𝄇
Now, then! There'll be plenty more fanservice all the way to the end!

![This is a gesture where you communicate that you hope everyone has a fun April Fools' Day.](https://i.imgur.com/lf81Ri9.png)
To avoid running into problems playing any of our releases, [please use mpv!](https://iamscum.wordpress.com/guides/videoplayback-guide/)
Get the most up-to-date subs for this project [here](https://github.com/Toa-of-Gallifrey/Fansubs/tree/main/Unsorted/Unmuxed%20scripts).

Translation: Modified Official (Scenik8 v1, via [AMH](https://cache.animetosho.org/nyaasi/view/1426541))
Song Translation: The Red Sea, Ikari Shinji, Official
Translation Check: Ikari Shinji
Editing: Rei Chiquita
Quality Check: Unit-00 (fishing)
Typesetting: Ikari Shinji, Rei Chiquita, [Scenik8 v2](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1NxKzkvsQECxuDgw0ShGwi0LzWcKnsua_)
Timing: Ikari Shinji
Encode: [Beatrice-Raws](https://nyaa.si/view/1675221)

Happy April Fools' Day! For this year, we decided to release the final Rebuild of Evangelion, having never released a single Evangelion episode or movie ever before! Being a 150 minute movie with almost 2,000 lines and like dozen or so songs (though most are in English), this is our most ambitious April Fools' release yet (and will almost certainly get to keep that distinction, because there's no way we're ever doing anything this difficult for April Fools' ever again), and it's been in the oven for a long time. We began on-and-off work on it a couple years ago (so long ago that Scenik8's v2 wasn't out yet) after telling each other that this was not a wise project to take on and after a while being like "okay but wouldn't it be epic if we did it though?", and intended on releasing it last year, but it was nowhere close to done come last March so we shifted gears and put out something else. As is customary for us, the only joke is that we released something completely out of left field. This is a release we took as seriously as all our other releases. This is also our first 4K release!

This release is a retimed TLC and edit of what we considered the best available sub, Scenik8's TLC and edit of the official subs for the movie, with typesetting both original and borrowed--you can tell very easily what was borrowed from the styles. We worked off Scenik8's v1, but once we found out there was a v2, we cross-referenced it to borrow from its corrections where needed. Both 2.0 and 5.1 audio are included (encoded from TrueHD to FLAC).

Some specific things we opted for:

- In addition to the Japanese songs, all the songs with English lyrics are subbed (which was something of a last-minute decision because so many of them are really hard to hear, but we had time and figured it was worth doing). However, the Latin song is not.

- We used spoken name order and honorifics, and spellings like Gendou and Touji rather than Gendo and Toji.

- We tried our best to keep the many recurring words and phrases as consistent as possible throughout the movie (and to reflect when they used variants and abbreviations for recurring terminology). We especially put a lot of thought into omajinai, which went through several iterations before settling on "gesture" as the most satisfactory option. Tangentially, we poked through a few Japanese Bibles before making the final determination on certain terminology, which was Unit-00 (fishing)'s favorite part of working on this release.

This sub is also available in [1080p](https://nyaa.si/view/1954607)!

We may or may not sub more of Eva someday, but if we do, it won't be anytime soon. Once again, Happy April Fools', everybody!

# 📚 漫画EPUB情報＆ガイド / Manga EPUB Info & Guide
 
EPUBファイルは、PC・スマホ・メディアサーバーなど様々な方法で閲覧・変換できます。

---

## 📦 ファイル互換性と変換方法 / File Compatibility and Conversion

このEPUBは、[Komga](https://komga.org/) や [Kavita](https://www.kavitareader.com/) のようなメディアサーバーを含め、多くのリーダーで使用できます。

> **EPUBファイルは7-ZipまたはWinRARで開くことができます。**  
> ファイル名に `kcc-` が含まれている場合、ページ順は正しいです。  
> `image_rsrc` が含まれている場合も、**EPUB2CBZ**を使えば正しい順序で画像抽出できます。  
> 📌 **画像（JPG）形式で保存したい場合は、EPUB2CBZでCBZ形式に変換するのが最も簡単です。**

📘 **日本語変換ガイド** – https://pastebin.com/8TTL9xJV  
📘 **English Conversion Guide** – https://pastebin.com/04XAsfps  
🔗 **EPUB2CBZダウンロード** – https://github.com/bust4cap/epub2cbz-gui/releases  

---

## 🧰 EPUB2CBZとは？ / What is EPUB2CBZ?

[EPUB2CBZ](https://github.com/bust4cap/epub2cbz-gui/releases) は、マンガ用EPUBファイルを画像付きのCBZ（ZIP）ファイルに変換するWindows向けツールです。  

- 日本語インターフェース対応  
- ComicInfo.xmlの自動生成（シリーズ・巻数・右開き対応）  
- 画像だけが必要な場合はオプションをOFFに  
- 出力形式のCBZはZIPとしても開けるため、7-ZipやWinRARで中身を取り出せます  

⚠️ ソフトの不具合などがあれば、ガイド内のメールアドレスまでご連絡ください。

※ Calibreも代替手段として使用可能ですが、変換精度や右開き対応の面でEPUB2CBZを推奨します。

---

## 📱 EPUB対応アプリのおすすめ (無料) / Software Recommendations (Freeware)

**PC / Mac**  
- [Thorium](https://thorium.edrlab.org/en/) - 高速・軽量で右開き対応のEPUBビューア   

**iPhone**  
- [Books（Apple Books）](https://apps.apple.com/jp/app/apple-books/id364709193)

**Android**  
- [Readera](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=org.readera&hl=ja&gl=US)  
- [Google Play Books](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.google.android.apps.books&hl=ja&gl=US)  
- [Mihon](https://mihon.app/download/)

---

## 📬 お問い合わせ / Contact

以下の内容に興味がある方は、[こちらのPastebin](https://pastebin.com/8TTL9xJV)に記載のメールアドレスまでご連絡ください。

- 購入した漫画を保存する方法を学ぶ  
- 透かしなしの最新刊漫画の交換  
- Komga/Kavita を使った自分専用の漫画サーバーの作成  

---

If you're interested in:

- Learning how to preserve the manga you purchased  
- Trading/swapping recently released manga with **NO WATERMARKS**  
- Creating your own manga server through **Komga/Kavita**

Please contact me using the details in [this pastebin](https://pastebin.com/04XAsfps).

*Batch release. Report issues and suggest improvements here or on discord.*

|-----------|-------------------|
| Video     | Amazon Hidive Channel (AVC) via Erai-raws, ToonsHub  |

| Chapters  | Automatic |

---

**Enhancements automatically applied:**
- Main dialogue restyled to Gandhi-Sans styling
- Timing post processor applied to patch up Hidive's terrible timing, snap to keyframe, etc.
- Readable subtitles - Overlapping lines no longer shift positions when you're trying to read them
- Signs have their proper fonts ripped
- Hidive's small font style for alternative speakers moved to top of screen
- Detection to add basic song styling
- Overlapping main dialogue given blue outline to differentiate speakers
- Fixed signs displaying on top of dialogue
- Faux em-dashes converted to real ones
- Proper stutter (W-what?! -> Wh-What?!, S-s-s-subsplus -> S-S-S-Subsplus)
- Detect OP & ED chapters using animethemes api

---

**Release Notes:**
> This batch uses the best web sources for this show and the most recent Hidive subtitle revision. Subtitles were ran through automation to fix major to minor annoyances. There was no extensive quality checking.
>
> Batch changes including Hidive script revisions are listed [here](https://rentry.co/ew7ybwhv)
>
> Enjoy the show!

# 📚 漫画EPUB情報＆ガイド / Manga EPUB Info & Guide
 
EPUBファイルは、PC・スマホ・メディアサーバーなど様々な方法で閲覧・変換できます。

---

## 📦 ファイル互換性と変換方法 / File Compatibility and Conversion

このEPUBは、[Komga](https://komga.org/) や [Kavita](https://www.kavitareader.com/) のようなメディアサーバーを含め、多くのリーダーで使用できます。

> **EPUBファイルは7-ZipまたはWinRARで開くことができます。**  
> ファイル名に `kcc-` が含まれている場合、ページ順は正しいです。  
> `image_rsrc` が含まれている場合も、**EPUB2CBZ**を使えば正しい順序で画像抽出できます。  
> 📌 **画像（JPG）形式で保存したい場合は、EPUB2CBZでCBZ形式に変換するのが最も簡単です。**

📘 **日本語変換ガイド** – https://pastebin.com/8TTL9xJV  
📘 **English Conversion Guide** – https://pastebin.com/04XAsfps  
🔗 **EPUB2CBZダウンロード** – https://github.com/bust4cap/epub2cbz-gui/releases  

---

## 🧰 EPUB2CBZとは？ / What is EPUB2CBZ?

[EPUB2CBZ](https://github.com/bust4cap/epub2cbz-gui/releases) は、マンガ用EPUBファイルを画像付きのCBZ（ZIP）ファイルに変換するWindows向けツールです。  

- 日本語インターフェース対応  
- ComicInfo.xmlの自動生成（シリーズ・巻数・右開き対応）  
- 画像だけが必要な場合はオプションをOFFに  
- 出力形式のCBZはZIPとしても開けるため、7-ZipやWinRARで中身を取り出せます  

⚠️ ソフトの不具合などがあれば、ガイド内のメールアドレスまでご連絡ください。

※ Calibreも代替手段として使用可能ですが、変換精度や右開き対応の面でEPUB2CBZを推奨します。

---

## 📱 EPUB対応アプリのおすすめ (無料) / Software Recommendations (Freeware)

**PC / Mac**  
- [Thorium](https://thorium.edrlab.org/en/) - 高速・軽量で右開き対応のEPUBビューア   

**iPhone**  
- [Books（Apple Books）](https://apps.apple.com/jp/app/apple-books/id364709193)

**Android**  
- [Readera](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=org.readera&hl=ja&gl=US)  
- [Google Play Books](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.google.android.apps.books&hl=ja&gl=US)  
- [Mihon](https://mihon.app/download/)

---

## 📬 お問い合わせ / Contact

以下の内容に興味がある方は、[こちらのPastebin](https://pastebin.com/8TTL9xJV)に記載のメールアドレスまでご連絡ください。

- 購入した漫画を保存する方法を学ぶ  
- 透かしなしの最新刊漫画の交換  
- Komga/Kavita を使った自分専用の漫画サーバーの作成  

---

If you're interested in:

- Learning how to preserve the manga you purchased  
- Trading/swapping recently released manga with **NO WATERMARKS**  
- Creating your own manga server through **Komga/Kavita**

Please contact me using the details in [this pastebin](https://pastebin.com/04XAsfps).

title: [VCB-Studio] 恋爱情结 / Lovely Complex / ラブ★コン 10-bit 1080p HEVC BDRip [Reseed Fin]
description:
![43765519_p0_800.webp](https://img.2222.moe/images/2024/09/05/43765519_p0_800.webp)  
  
恋爱情结 / Lovely Complex / ラブ★コン BDRip Reseed  
  
得益于美版 BD 鬼斧神工的 upconv 手段，本作虽是 SD 制作却获得了非常不错的画质。不过原盘码率较低，有些压烂的蚊噪和 dither，我们对此进行了针对性处理。  
Thanks to the awesome upconversion techniques in the US BD version, even though this title was originally made in SD, the quality turned out pretty great. That said, the original disc has a low bitrate, so there's some heavily compressed DCT noise and dither. We've done some specific tweaks to fix those.  
  

* * *

重发修正：  
1\. 修复 Menu02 的花屏问题。  
  
Reseed comment:  
1\. Fixed the screen distortion issue of Menu02.  
  

* * *

本次发布来自 VCB-Studio 旧作重发计划。我们会不定期重发过去发布过的合集，或为补充做种，或为修正制作错漏，或为整合系列合集。  
This is a release of VCB-Studio Reseed Project. We would re-upload previous torrents from time to time, to resurrect old torrents with few seeders, to correct errors/omissions, or to batch separate releases that belong to a same series.

title: [Mr Yosha] Dragon Ball Kai (53-61 USBD Sync) Yamamoto Score
description:
![Episode 53](https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/dragonball/images/f/fc/DBZ_Kai_Ep_53_Eng_Titlecard.png/revision/latest/scale-to-width-down/320?cb=20240721195513) ![Episode 61](https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/dragonball/images/4/46/DBZ_Kai_Ep_61_Eng_Titlecard.png/revision/latest/scale-to-width-down/320?cb=20250316172340)
### **Edit: [Seed of Might's Kai Release](https://nyaa.si/view/2006263) already has these episodes synced so go download that**

Episodes 53-61 of Dragon Ball (Z) Kai with the Kenji Yamamoto score in lossless quality (FLAC 16bit to be precise). This is synced to the USBD so I'd recommend syncing this to [Impact's Version](https://nyaa.si/view/1110750). 

If you're wondering what makes this different from the [Yamamamoto Revival](https://nyaa.si/view/1202685) aside from it being lossless I've made a few improvements.
1. No peaking: This did require me to lower the volume but this can be fixed by raising the volume in whatever device and/or media player you're using.
2. Restored SFXs: Basically DBKai's English dub uses [5.1 surround sound](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/5.1_surround_sound), and if you want to remove the music you just isolate the center channel. This causes the issue of losing some sound effects though. But [Diccolo on Kanzenshuu](https://www.kanzenshuu.com/forum/viewtopic.php?t=41765) discovered a way to restore most of these remaining SFXs. So I just used the same method as he did for my own project. Now explosions, energy blasts, and offscreen character voices are more in-line with the official version

**FAQs**
**1. What's with the "No Music" and "Music Only" folders?**
If you have a problem with how I did the music but like my restored SFXs then you can use "No Music". If you don't like my restored SFXs don't want to individually place every track back in place, you can use "Music Only" for that. 

**2. Why is it stereo and not 5.1 surround sound?**
Restoring the SFXs requires downmixing the front and back tracks into a single stereo track. So I don't really see a reason to make it 5.1 aside from consistency with the rest of the dub.

**3. Can you make a lossy version of this?**
Half the point of this project was to have a lossless version of the Yamamoto score, so no.

**4. Why only episodes 53-61?**
I think putting this out in small batches as opposed to one big batch would be better for everyone. Since there's always the chance I don't finish this project for whatever reasons I'd rather have at least a few episodes of lossless Yamamoto out there than none at all.

Also, thanks to [Kenisu's blog](https://kenisu3000.blogspot.com/2020/12/the-unofficial-dragonball-kai-bgm.html) for helping me on this project. If it weren't for it I would've taken even longer on this project.

title: Geisters - Fractions of the Earth 01-26 JAP (ENG) (hybrid subs)
description:
Cries were heard out, I'm reuploading old series which is either not complete, not seeded, not subbed or in poor container format and inconsistent audio. 
I remember uploading this as incomplete long ago, now however its with consistent audio(only Japanese and some also English), complete series subbed. 
Beware though, episodes 14-26 have AI subs, so they are of low quality, but that's the most I can do, hopefully someone can finish this to perfection. 
About series: 
Geisters (ガイスターズ FRACTIONS OF THE EARTH, Gaisutāzu Furakushonsu obu za Āsu) is a 26-episode anime series from directors Jang Jong-Geun, Koji Itoh, and Sumio Watanabe. The series aired on TV Tokyo from October 6, 2001 to March 30, 2002.
Earth AD 2057
Four hundred years ago, it became certain than an asteroid would collide with Earth and the extinction of the race was at hand. Mankind spent 10 years devising a plan to survive. The Dobias went out to live in space while the Shioru forged a new world underground. Three hundred years ago, mankind returned to the surface from beyond the stars and beneath the ground.
But the surface was not what it once was, and mankind was forced to battle for supremacy with a new life form born from the ashes of destruction. Man was no longer at the top of the food chain. That spot was occupied by the Siliconians, creatures who roam the landscape searching for prey. Meanwhile, the Dobias—scientists and nobles—and the Shioru—farmers and nomads—are engaged in a cold war over the limited remaining resources, a cold war that threatens to turn hot.
Amidst this battle for survival of the fittest between creature and man are Dean Honos, Alcion Fama, Cris Vesta, Victor Deicius, and Shai Tanna. Together, they are the Geisters, the Dobias' ultimate fighting force. They are armed powers, abilities, and weapons far beyond normal humans, and they are the last hope for mankind.

title: ＢＳ世界のドキュメンタリー「私はマドンナ　前編　世界を征服したい」
description:
ＢＳ世界のドキュメンタリー「私はマドンナ　前編　世界を征服したい」
[BS] 
2025年04月01日 午後11:25 〜 午前0:13 (48分)
敬けんなカトリック教徒を親に持ち、厳しくしつけられた少女は、いかにして今日のマドンナになったのか。発掘された映像・音声・インタビューでつづる話題作の前編。

	はみ出し者の学生時代を送ったマドンナは３５ドルを手に、知り合いのいないニューヨークに飛び込む。独学でドラムやギター、ピアノを身につけ、音楽活動を始めた彼女の目標は「世界を征服すること」。出会った人を踏み台に、スターへの階段を駆け上がっていく。１９８４年に「ライク・ア・ヴァージン」を発表するが、初披露のステージが物議を醸すことに。　原題：Ｂｅｃｏｍｉｎｇ　Ｍａｄｏｎｎａ（イギリス　２０２４年）

１年にわたって若者を応援してきた「ＮＨＫでやらなさそうなアレ（仮）」がついにレギュラー化！引き続きやす子さんが、みなさんを応援していきまーす！

	１年にわたって若者を応援してきた「ＮＨＫでやらなさそうなアレ（仮）」がついにレギュラー化！引き続きやす子さんが、みなさんを応援していきまーす！今回のテーマは、若者に人気の縦型ショートドラマ！「バズる動画を作りたい！」縦型動画の制作集団を訪ねて、その秘密に迫ります！

title: おとなのＥテレタイムマシン　きょうの料理　土井勝　正月料理
description:
おとなのＥテレタイムマシン　きょうの料理　土井勝　正月料理
[Ｅテレ] 
2025年04月01日 午後10:45 〜 午後11:15 (30分)
Ｅテレの膨大なアーカイブから選りすぐりの番組を厳選！今回は１９８７年１２月７日放送のきょうの料理「土井勝　正月料理」。

	戦後、料理学校を開いて校長を務める一方、「きょうの料理」放送開始初期から出演、やさしい語り口とわかりやすい指導で人気を博した土井勝さん。今回は“今でもこのレシピで毎年つくっている”という声も多い「黒豆」のほか、「田づくり」「酢ごぼう」「数の子」「昆布巻き」「紅白菊花かぶら」を紹介します。

description:
国際報道２０２５　トランプ関税　“脱アメリカ”を模索する動き
[BS] 
2025年04月01日 午後10:00 〜 午後10:45 (45分)
アメリカに依存してきた企業の間で出始めた“脱アメリカ”を模索する動き

	トランプ政権は、４月２日、相互関税などの最重要政策に掲げる関税の全容を明らかにする。輸入車への関税も３日に発動することを表明。貿易赤字削減やアメリカへの製造業回帰などを狙っているが、保護主義的な政策を強めるアメリカへの反発も高まっている。こうした中、アメリカに依存してきた企業の間で出始めた“脱アメリカ”の動きを追う。

「べらぼう」蔦谷重三郎に才能を見出された世界的文豪・曲亭馬琴。完成に２８年を要した「南総里見八犬伝」、偉業はなぜ達成されたのか？　紆余曲折に満ちた人物像を追う。

	「べらぼう」蔦谷重三郎のもとで働いていたこともある苦労人・曲亭馬琴。武家に生まれるもやさぐれて放浪、追い詰められて筆の道に進むも、無粋な性格が災いして芽が出ず…そんなとき押し寄せた出版弾圧の波がもたらした、馬琴の一大転機とは？　武家から町人に転じたことで生涯悩んだ馬琴。奇想天外エンターテインメント「八犬伝」に、あえて真面目で道徳的なテーマを盛り込んだ理由とは？　視力を失っても書き続けた執念の人生！

[Ｅテレ] 
2025年04月01日 午後9:25 〜 午後9:30 (5分)
小ぶりでコロンとした新じゃが。皮が薄くて柔らかいので、皮付きのまま丸ごと調理できます。焼くもよし、煮るもよし。今だけのおいしさを満喫しましょう。

	「新じゃがの蒸し焼き」は、じゃがいもを大きめに切って、外はこんがり、中はしっとり仕上げます。にんにくとオリーブ油で風味よく焼き上げ、パセリで色を添えましょう。「新じゃがと豚ひき肉の和風煮」は、甘辛味のひき肉が新じゃがにからんで、うまみもボリュームもアップ。ご飯がすすむおかずです。

	まずは「新じゃがマーボー」。新じゃがいもを皮ごと使ってマーボー仕立てにした食べごたえのある一品です。続いては「新たまねぎのメンチカツ」。たっぷり入れた新たまねぎの甘さを存分に味わえます。最後は「にらとねぎのあえ麺」。太くて香りのよい旬のにらをたっぷりのせ、仕上げに熱した油をジューっと回しかけます。五感が喜ぶ春の料理、ぜひお試しください。

title: きょうの健康　腰痛　タイプ別の治療　決定版　足のしびれを伴う腰痛　座骨神経痛
description:
きょうの健康　腰痛　タイプ別の治療　決定版　足のしびれを伴う腰痛　座骨神経痛
[Ｅテレ] 
2025年04月01日 午後8:30 〜 午後8:45 (15分)
腰痛のなかには足のしびれや痛み、いわゆる「座骨神経痛」を伴うものも。急性腰痛とは異なる痛みの治療が必要だ。脊柱管狭さく症と椎間板ヘルニアの治療と対策を紹介する。

	座骨神経痛を伴いやすい腰痛で多いのは「腰部脊柱管狭さく症」。足がしびれたり、しびれや痛みのせいで、長く続けて歩けない症状が出やすい。「腰椎椎間板ヘルニア」もヘルニアの出た場所によっては座骨神経痛がでる。どちらもしびれ対策の薬などを使って治療する。併用しやすい新しい薬も登場。手術しないで治すヘルニアの新治療も行われるように。腰に負担をかけない運動で背中の筋肉を鍛えて予防・改善を心がけることが大切。

title: 中井精也の絶景！てつたび　厳冬の秋田　白銀に伸びる鉄路を行く！
description:
中井精也の絶景！てつたび　厳冬の秋田　白銀に伸びる鉄路を行く！
[BS] 
2025年04月01日 午後7:00 〜 午後8:00 (1時間0分)
鉄道写真家・中井精也がローカル鉄道のすばらしさを再発見する。今回は厳冬の秋田県３路線を旅する。豪雪の地で人々のぬくもりを感じながら、絶景をカメラに収めていく。

	鉄道写真家・中井精也がローカル鉄道のすばらしさを再発見する。今回は厳冬の秋田県３路線、秋田内陸縦貫鉄道・ＪＲ男鹿線・由利高原鉄道を旅する。豪雪の地で人々のぬくもりを感じながら絶景をカメラに収めていく。マタギ修行をするＩＴエンジニアや３０年以上終着駅で乗客を見守る土産物店の店主など、この地を愛する人の情にふれる。中井精也が４４年前におとずれた駅で同じ構図に挑戦。あなたも「てつたび」に出発したくなる！

title: クローズアップ現代　被災者が訴えられる～震災１４年　訴訟３００件超はなぜ～
description:
クローズアップ現代　被災者が訴えられる～震災１４年　訴訟３００件超はなぜ～
[総合] 
2025年04月01日 午後7:30 〜 午後7:57 (27分)
被災者が裁判にかけられる異例の事態が多発している。自治体が被災者支援のため貸し付けた「災害援護資金」の返済を求める訴訟だ。返済期限を迎え混乱する被災地の実態は。

	いま、被災者が自治体に訴えられる異例の事態が多発している。東日本大震災の被災者のため自治体が貸し付けた「災害援護資金」の返済を求める訴訟だ。返済期限は１３年。約２万８千件の貸し付けの多くが期限を迎える中、滞納額は約６３億円にも上り、被災者は返済苦に陥っている。一方で取り立てを行う自治体の苦悩や、制度の課題が積み残されてきた実態もわかってきた。将来、同じ問題を繰り返さないために何が必要か考える。

title: 驚き！地球！グレートネイチャー　壮観！黄金文明の大地　～ブルガリア～
description:
驚き！地球！グレートネイチャー　壮観！黄金文明の大地　～ブルガリア～
[BS] 
2025年04月01日 午後5:30 〜 午後6:00 (30分)
絶景あふれる東欧・ブルガリア。威容を放つ白亜の大山塊、“神の目”から光注ぐ洞窟、黄金色に輝く山肌…。そして、太古の大地殻変動は、この地に黄金文明をもたらした！？

	東ヨーロッパのブルガリアは、紀元前にトラキア人が黄金文明を築いた地で、絶景の宝庫でもある。ピリン山脈を訪ねると…真っ白な山頂付近を占めていたのは雪ではなく、巨大な大理石の山塊だった！？地下深くでできる大理石が標高３０００ｍの大山塊となった謎を探ると、黄金文明誕生の謎も明らかに。やがてトラキアの人々は、“神の目”が宿る神秘的な洞窟に身を隠す…。ブルガリアの大地誕生の秘密と黄金文明の栄枯盛衰の物語。

You ever been so goddam hungry for that succulent supple sideways under age chinese pussy you sold your asshole in a furry suit to the weird green turban man who rearranged your grandpa's guts to death? Uhh yeah me either... 

But Son Goku has! Back in highschool he wanted the chichussy so bad but she refused to give it our to guys who can't dance the Macarena. Which btw is a song about a woman who is happy her solder husband was deployed to a war zone so his friends can fuck her asshole without a condom. Anyway Gogo wants to jizz inside her cunt so badly that he asks his grand daddy to teach him to dance. He can't dance the white man's dance so he calls his ex husband to teach him. His ex husband is still mad he cheated with a black woman so he comes over and murders him. Son furry joins forces with the local prostitute to find the magic 7 kidney stones because I guess those will help her revenge on his ex step grandpa somehow?

Along the way they meet a trans woman who fucks his cat and his grandpa's old dance teacher. They journey to the gay bar to teach everyone the secret evil containment dance  before they can learn to dance like an Indian street shitter at the end of a Bollywood movie the throat goat that piccorro daimao hired to find a cure for kidney stones comes along and shanks muten master like a prison bitch. 

Long dong Goku makes a deal with devil, put on the ape man fursuit and yiff with him in hell tonight for the old man's soul to be returned to his body. Of course this is a lie and once it's revealed the only solution is a dance battle. Wukong the monkey king does a dance so glorious it summons the dragon god by mistake.  As thanks for the show he returns the old dance master to life. As the movie fades out you see our hero Son Goku finally engaging in fireplay with his child bride and everyone claps.

Why we synced 22 dubs and 43 subs to this dumpster fire I'll never know but that's what drinking weed does to a mf.

title: [Malkav Animes e Weezy] Koneko no Studio (Kitty's Studio) - Movie [HDTV 720p Port-BR]
description:
![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/x208jf2.jpeg "Logo Title Text 1")

Koneko no Studio é o segundo movie/curta, o primeiro foi Koneko no Rakugaki de 13 minutos de 1957.
Nesse vemos nossa gatinha Koneko como diretora de um filme, estrelado os mesmo ratinhos do primeiro curta, como samurais. Só que as coisas não vão indo bem, devido aos problemas decorrentes do velho estúdio e péssimos atores, a diretora Koneko resolveu automatizar o estúdio. A máquina de fabricar robôs produz o quanto for necessário, tornando os atores dispensáveis. As expectativas é de que esses robôs encenarão performances jamais vistas. Mas nem tudo é o que a Koneko espera.

title: LaMB 2009 ENG
description:
I will let you know, I can share also small rare/lost stuff - (which you will probably won't find anywhere on internet - 
or maybe I didn't try hard enough? How did I get this before... lol). 
I shared this one long ago and though it was adopted by nyaa, I see no seeders at this time, so I'm reuploading it. 
Now, let me remind you what it is again:
LaMB is a 2009 Singaporean-Japanese animated film directed by Ryosuke Tei based on a script written by Carmelo S. J. Juinio and illustrated by Yasufumi Soejima, produced by Animax. The film tells the story of a futuristic inhabited planet that has seemingly perfected a system of justice and imprisonment, called "Lamination". Individuals convicted of serious crimes are encased in laminated suits, which results in virtual slavery. The criminals are referred to as "LaMBs". The protagonists struggle with the political and ethical system of laminated imprisonment, leading to the eventual development of a romantic relationship between a free citizen and a LaMB.
Since picture is worth thousands words:

title: Weekly K Manga Chapter Updates - Week 14 2025 (Digital) (RillQuila)
description:
Native rips obtained directly from [K Manga](https://kmanga.kodansha.com/).
Chapters ripped by [Aquila](https://mega.nz/folder/QWdCGIgC#_nr--LQC2U2QNcG5StQksw) and compiled by Rillant.

---

General info:
* Batches are uploaded on Tuesday evening.
* Split chapters that were originally published as a whole are joined, split chapters that were originally published split are not.
* For some series the title is so long that it exceeds the maximum path length, in this case (folder) names will be truncated. *(Example: the folder name for "I Was Reincarnated as the 7th Prince so I Can Take My Time Perfecting My Magical Ability" is simply "I Was Reincarnated as the 7th Prince.")*
* Previous batches can be found [here](https://nyaa.si/?f=0&c=3_1&q=weekly+k+manga+chapter+update).
* To search batches, use google with the following string: "site:nyaa.si weekly k manga {search query}". 
* For any questions or suggestions, leave a comment or message me on Discord.

title: [LoliHouse] 精灵来日 / 歡迎來到日本，妖精小姐。 / 日本へようこそエルフさん。 / Nihon e Youkoso Elf-san. [01-12合集][WebRip 1080p HEVC-10bit AAC][简繁内封字幕][Fin]
[Blasphemboys] Super Zugan - 1-8 TV (1992) [WEB-DL AVC AC3]
description:
Raws: [WOWmd's Amazon rip](https://nyaa.si/view/1726669)
Based on: [/mjg/ repo subs](https://files.riichi.moe/mjg/movies%20and%20other%20media/super%20zugan%20subs/), episode 1 by [8pin](https://nyaa.si/view/1722500), further polished by us
Translation check, typesetting: Perevodildo
Mahjong translation check: Muzussawa

It's not in my habit to drop things like that, but this show proved to literal Kryptonite for me; I find the mere thought of working on it headache-inducing. I simply cannot work on something that glorifies nothing but vices and quagmire. Still, if you, yes you, think you can TLC it and un-retard the 4chan subs in my stead, go ahead and get in touch with us, because I wouldn't mind finishing the show if I only have to do the painless parts, which is everything but the TLC, and muzu is into depravity in general. Personally, though, I know that I'm doing society a favor by not bringing this atrocity to light. 

The history so far: 
In my latest desperate attempt at soliciting Muzu's nudes, I let myself be led down a garden path and into another midjong show, because "How bad can it be," right...? I had no idea it can. For the first time in my subbing career, I was unironically questioning what I'm doing with my life, and I'm a fansubber, which is a useless vocation in its own right! I was hoping that making more frequent breaks for other shows would make it any more bearable, but alas, my every attempt to return to this show proved more painful than the previous one, until we got to this point where the mere thought of Super Zugan makes me wince. After 8 episodes, I realized that I'd rather do a resub of all of Sailor Moon than 21 episodes of Super Zugan. Hell, I'd rather do the Fighting Beauty Wulong that Collectr had been trying to palm off to me, because if I do any more episodes of Super Zugan, I'll become a domestic terrorist. I even finished Haikara-san, but not this.
However, if you wanted to watch it for mahjong, I'm not sorry, because you are mentally damaged as it is, therefore the 4chan memesubs would be just what the doctor ordered for you. 
For this release, I translation-checked the non-mahjong parts, removed all 4chan slurs and memes and added typesetting. Muzussawa did the same for the mahjong parts, although he skipped the "what to cut" eyecatches between episodes because nobody cares. Overall, it was actually a pretty solid translation, if not for the slurs, which, to be fair, probably only made the mahjong part actually any entertaining. 

Episodes: 
1. Springtime for the Luckless {ツカンポ野郎に春が来た} / Severance Zugan {縁切りヅガン}
2. Happy Birthday Zugan {ハッピーバースデーヅガン} / Rejected Zugan {ふられてヅガン}
3. The Toyotomi Machine of Terror {恐怖の豊臣マシーン} / Snowside Zugan {スノーサイドヅガン}
4. Rake Zugan {カッパギヅガン} / Akina Once More {明菜ふたたび}
5. You're a Perfect Person {君は完璧さ}
6. Object X From Osaka {大阪からの物体X} / Hot Water Zugan {湯あたりヅガン}
7. Baby Player Ponta {ベイビー雀士・ポン太} / Jongputer in a Pond {井の中の雀ピューター}
8. Tsumo-Jong to Make You Cry {泣かせるツモジャン} 

TL notes, mostly the stuff I moved here from the dumb usual inline notes of the previous iteration of these subs: 
• "Tsukan" is a mahjong slang for "out of luck," then "Zugan" is the ultimate form of that, so the show's title translates to something like "Shit Out of Luck." 
• Toyotomi Hideyuki's name might be referencing [Toyotomi Hideyoshi](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Toyotomi_Hideyoshi). 
• Episode 7: 
![](https://i.imgur.com/DEi5UdP.png)
It's a reference to another overhyped Mahjong slop of the time, that me and Muzu had done [for Orphan](https://nyaa.si/view/1908566)—Naki no Ryuu. There, the MC used his catchphrase "Your back is sooty," as his way of saying "Omae wa mou shindeiru." 
![](https://i.imgur.com/NUQXN3U.png) 
is referencing the catchphrase of a Japanese folk hero, [Kin-san](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/T%C5%8Dyama_no_Kin-san) (I translated an anime inspired by his life for Inka-subs) and [Honda Shigetsugu's letter to his wife](https://markussesko.com/2019/03/11/honda-shigetsugus-letter/).  
• Episode 8: ![](https://i.imgur.com/3cbAkPF.png) are referencing poems by Murou Saisei and Sei Shonagon. 
• ![](https://i.imgur.com/zYrogRO.png) is 'In classical Japanese, parodying the gunka "Shussei Heishi wo Okuru Uta"' according to /mjg/. I don't give two fucks about this show, so don't expect me to fact-check any of that. 

[AniDB](https://anidb.net/anime/3547) | [Subs Only](https://github.com/Perevodildo/Perevodildo-softsubs/tree/main/Super%20Zugan) | [DDL](https://t.me/+GDbKBqecLXBjNGM6)

title: [Some-Stuffs] Evangelion 3.0+1.11 - Thrice Upon a Time (BD 4k HEVC 10-bit FLAC) [871B9DF9] (Evangelion New Theatrical Version 𝄇 | Shin Evangelion Gekijouban 𝄇 | Rebuild of Evangelion 3.0+1.0 | 3.0+1.01)
description:
**NOTE:** Most of the fonts are mistakenly missing from this version. We'll get a fix out as soon as we can, but for the time being, if you want to watch in 4K, please either download and use this [mks](https://files.catbox.moe/atezeo.mks) (drag-and-drop into mpv, or put it in the same directory as the video and rename to "[Some-Stuffs] Evangelion 3.0+1.11 - Thrice Upon a Time (BD 4k HEVC 10-bit FLAC) [871B9DF9].mks"), or install the fonts from this archive [here](https://animetosho.org/storage/attachpk/1265834/%5BSome-Stuffs%5D%20Evangelion%203.0%2B1.11%20-%20Thrice%20Upon%20a%20Time%20%28BD%201080p%20HEVC%2010-bit%20FLAC%29%20%5B7FDCD65A%5D_attachments.7z). Very sorry for the inconvenience.

-----

[Hit it!](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HS_rdaHvGP0)
Misato and WILLE's crew, rallying to put an end to it all.
Asuka and Mari, advancing in their grievously wounded Evas to put an end to it all.
Ikari Shinji, confronting his father Gendou so he can put an end to it all.
And Shinji's final decision: Farewell, all Evangelion!
~~Next time~~ RIGHT NOW, Evangelion New Theatrical Version 𝄇
Now, then! There'll be plenty more fanservice all the way to the end!

![This is a gesture where you communicate that you hope everyone has a fun April Fools' Day.](https://i.imgur.com/lf81Ri9.png)
To avoid running into problems playing any of our releases, [please use mpv!](https://iamscum.wordpress.com/guides/videoplayback-guide/)
Get the most up-to-date subs for this project [here](https://github.com/Toa-of-Gallifrey/Fansubs/tree/main/Unsorted/Unmuxed%20scripts).

Translation: Modified Official (Scenik8 v1, via [AMH](https://cache.animetosho.org/nyaasi/view/1426541))
Song Translation: The Red Sea, Ikari Shinji, Official
Translation Check: Ikari Shinji
Editing: Rei Chiquita
Quality Check: Unit-00 (fishing)
Typesetting: Ikari Shinji, Rei Chiquita, [Scenik8 v2](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1NxKzkvsQECxuDgw0ShGwi0LzWcKnsua_)
Timing: Ikari Shinji
Encode: [Beatrice-Raws](https://nyaa.si/view/1675221)

Happy April Fools' Day! For this year, we decided to release the final Rebuild of Evangelion, having never released a single Evangelion episode or movie ever before! Being a 150 minute movie with almost 2,000 lines and like dozen or so songs (though most are in English), this is our most ambitious April Fools' release yet (and will almost certainly get to keep that distinction, because there's no way we're ever doing anything this difficult for April Fools' ever again), and it's been in the oven for a long time. We began on-and-off work on it a couple years ago (so long ago that Scenik8's v2 wasn't out yet) after telling each other that this was not a wise project to take on and after a while being like "okay but wouldn't it be epic if we did it though?", and intended on releasing it last year, but it was nowhere close to done come last March so we shifted gears and put out something else. As is customary for us, the only joke is that we released something completely out of left field. This is a release we took as seriously as all our other releases. This is also our first 4K release!

This release is a retimed TLC and edit of what we considered the best available sub, Scenik8's TLC and edit of the official subs for the movie, with typesetting both original and borrowed--you can tell very easily what was borrowed from the styles. We worked off Scenik8's v1, but once we found out there was a v2, we cross-referenced it to borrow from its corrections where needed. Both 2.0 and 5.1 audio are included (encoded from TrueHD to FLAC).

Some specific things we opted for:

- In addition to the Japanese songs, all the songs with English lyrics are subbed (which was something of a last-minute decision because so many of them are really hard to hear, but we had time and figured it was worth doing). However, the Latin song is not.

- We used spoken name order and honorifics, and spellings like Gendou and Touji rather than Gendo and Toji.

- We tried our best to keep the many recurring words and phrases as consistent as possible throughout the movie (and to reflect when they used variants and abbreviations for recurring terminology). We especially put a lot of thought into omajinai, which went through several iterations before settling on "gesture" as the most satisfactory option. Tangentially, we poked through a few Japanese Bibles before making the final determination on certain terminology, which was Unit-00 (fishing)'s favorite part of working on this release.

This sub is also available in [1080p](https://nyaa.si/view/1954607)!

We may or may not sub more of Eva someday, but if we do, it won't be anytime soon. Once again, Happy April Fools', everybody!

title: Gou Tanabe - H.P. Lovecrafts The Shadow Over Innsmouth (2023)
description:
Originally uploaded by XRA-Empire.

A manga adaptation of a classic horror story by Lovecraft.

From the publisher's website:
H.P. Lovecraft's The Shadow Over Innsmouth TPB
A new manga adaptation of the only H.P. Lovecraft story published as a book during his lifetime, by modern horror master Gou Tanabe!

In the winter of 1927-28, the isolated coastal settlement of Innsmouth, Massachusetts was assaulted by U.S. government agents--its waterfront burned and dynamited, its people taken away to internment camps.

Yet that was neither the beginning nor the end of the horror uncovered by a young antiquarian who traveled to Innsmouth in search of rumors from the town's dead past, only to find them still very much alive ... and find truths lying under water deeper and colder than any earthly grave!

This book includes a tip-in title page in silver ink and 12 pages in full color!

"I love H.P. Lovecraft. It would be great to adapt him as a serialized manga, but I actually saw Gou Tanabe create a great adaption of H.P. Lovecraft's stories. Afterwards, I ended up not doing it because I thought I wouldn't be as good as Gou's version."-Junji Ito (Uzumaki, Venus in the Blind Spot)

Creators
Artist:
Gou Tanabe
Translator:
Zack Davisson
Cover Artist:
Gou Tanabe
Genre: Science-Fiction, Manga, Horror

title: Seiichi Hayashi - Sekishoku Elegy (Red Colored Elegy)
description:
Originally scanned by fuckPalestine.

A true masterpiece and a milestone in avant-garde manga.

From the publisher's website:
A true cornerstone of the Japanese underground scene of the 1960s
Seiichi Hayashi produced Red Colored Elegy between 1970 and 1971, in the aftermath of a politically turbulent and culturally vibrant decade that promised but failed to deliver new possibilities. With a combination of sparse line work and visual codes borrowed from animation and film, the quiet, melancholy lives of a young couple struggling to make ends meet are beautifully captured in this poetic masterpiece. Uninvolved with the political movements of the time, Ichiro and Sachiko hope for something better, but they’re no revolutionaries; their spare time is spent drinking, smoking, daydreaming, and sleeping—together and at times with others. While Ichiro attempts to make a living from his comics, Sachiko’s parents are eager to arrange a marriage for her, but Ichiro doesn’t seem interested. Both in their relationship and at work, Ichiro and Sachiko are unable to say the things they need to say, and like any couple, at times say things to each other that they do not mean, ultimately communicating as much with their body language and what remains unsaid as with words.
 Red Colored Elegy is informed as much by underground Japanese comics of the time as it is by the French nouvelle vague, and its cultural referents range from James Dean to Ken Takakura. Its influence in Japan was so great that Morio Agata, a prominent Japanese folk musician and singer/songwriter, debuted with a love song written and named after it.

title: [keenoe] Sousou no Frieren - 01
description:
This footage exhibits pronounced chromatic aberration—visible as color fringing and distortion—due to being captured with an old Zeiss Plan-Apochromat (circa 1930s). Since lenses like this lack distortion metadata, modern digital cameras are unable to compensate.

To restore the image, we employed a photochemical process: the original video was projected in reverse through the same lens onto physical film negative, effectively "undoing" the lens’ optical flaws. The resulting negative was then rescanned using a high-resolution modern film scanner (e.g., Lasergraphics Director 10K), yielding a cleaner image with minimized chromatic artifacts.

This hybrid analog-digital approach leverages the lens’s inherent characteristics to counteract its own distortions—a solution blending vintage optics with contemporary precision.

https://slow.pics/c/eT2eUgnL?image-position=top+left

title: Yoshihiro Tatsumi - Gekiga Yose Shiba Hama (Fallen Words)
description:
Originally scanned by kickthekitty & fuckPalestine.

Another great manga by the master Yoshihiro Tatsumi.

From the publisher’s website:
A NEW COLECTION OF STORIES FROM THE FOREFATHER OF THE JAPANESE LITERARY COMICS MOVEMENT

In Fallen Words, Yoshihiro Tatsumi takes up the oral tradition of rakugo and breathes new life into it by shifting the format from spoken word to manga. Each of the eight stories in the collection is lifted from the Edo-era Japanese storytelling form. As Tatsumi notes in the afterword, the world of rakugo, filled with mystery, emotion, revenge, hope, and, of course, love, overlaps perfectly with the world of Gekiga that he has spent the better part of his life developing.

These slice-of-life stories resonate with modern readers thanks to their comedic elements and familiarity with human idiosyncrasies. In one, a father finds his son too bookish and arranges for two workers to take the young man to a brothel on the pretext of visiting a new shrine. In another particularly beloved rakugo tale, a married man falls in love with a prostitute. When his wife finds out, she is enraged and sets a curse on the other woman. The prostitute responds by cursing the wife, and the two escalate in a spiral of voodoo doll cursing. Soon both are dead, but even death can't extinguish their jealousy.

Tatsumi's love of wordplay shines through in the telling of these whimsical stories, and yet he still offers timeless insight into human nature.

title: Yoshihiro Tatsumi - Gekiga Hyouryuu (Drifting Life)
description:
A rare manga and a great read.

From the publisher's website:

A Drifting Life
The epic autobiography of a manga master

Acclaimed for his visionary short-story collections The Push Man and Other Stories, Abandon the Old in Tokyo, and Good-Bye—originally created nearly forty years ago, but just as resonant now as ever—the legendary Japanese cartoonist Yoshihiro Tatsumi has come to be recognized in North America as a precursor of today's graphic novel movement. A Drifting Life is his monumental memoir eleven years in the making, beginning with his experiences as a child in Osaka, growing up as part of a country burdened by the shadows of World War II.

Spanning fifteen years from August 1945 to June 1960, Tatsumi's stand-in protagonist, Hiroshi, faces his father's financial burdens and his parents' failing marriage, his jealous brother's deteriorating health, and the innumerable pitfalls that await him in the competitive manga market of mid-twentieth-century Japan. He dreams of following in the considerable footsteps of his idol, the manga artist Osamu Tezuka (Astro Boy, Apollo's Song, Ode to Kirihito, Buddha)—with whom Tatsumi eventually became a peer and, at times, a stylistic rival. As with his short-story collection, A Drifting Life is designed by Adrian Tomine.


Translated by Taro Nettleton

**Год выхода:** 2025

**Перевод  #1:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [Dream Cast](https://dreamerscast.com/)
**Перевод  #2:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [AniBaza](https://t.me/Ani_Baza)

**Описание:**
Четырнадцать воинов отправлены императором для выполнения опаснейшей миссии. Трое погибли в пути. Ещё четверо были убиты за то, что якобы предали императора. Но последнее было ложью семи оставшихся в живых воинов, которые хотели присвоить все почести себе. Они с триумфом вернулись в столицу, где их назвали «Семь героев». Они пользовались уважением жителей империи и заняли высокое положение. Но один из считавшихся мёртвыми воинов выжил. Изменив внешность и имя, спустя годы он вернулся отомстить.

06. Штемвелех | Schtemwölch

**Дополнительная информация:**
Тёмное фэнтези - редкий зверь в нашем рационе, а тут еще и по уважаемому первоисточнику, я уверен тайтл нас не разочарует и станет одним из самых лучшим в этом году. Кровь, насилие, месть, предательства - все атрибуты жанра на месте. Аниме выходит на At-x раньше чем на остальных сервисах - поэтому есть версия без цензуры R17 (и из за сцен насилия и из за сцен с бубами)

title: 緊急！町民オーディション　福島市飯野町
description:
緊急！町民オーディション　福島市飯野町
[総合] 
2025年03月31日 午後11:00 〜 午後11:30 (30分)
知名度が低いことにお悩みの地方の小さな町をロバート秋山が全力プロデュース！オーディションで選抜した個性豊かな町民を起用し、町のＰＲ動画「まちブイ」を制作する。

	舞台は福島市飯野町。５０００人ほどが暮らす山あいの町は、古くからＵＦＯの目撃証言が多数報告されている「ＵＦＯの里」だ。町にはＵＦＯ型の街灯や宇宙人の石像が並び、町自慢の観光名所「ＵＦＯふれあい館」には、古今東西のＵＦＯの資料が集められている。マニアの間では知られた町だが、もっと広く魅力を知ってもらいたいという。天才プロデューサー・ロバート秋山は個性的な町民を起用して、どんな作品を作り上げるのか？

description:
国際報道２０２５　視聴者の声とともに考える　トランプ関税と世界
[BS] 
2025年03月31日 午後10:00 〜 午後10:45 (45分)
次々と打ち出されるトランプ大統領の関税政策が、世界で波紋を呼んでいる。世界はどこへ向かうのか、国際報道の新キャスターが、視聴者の声をもとに専門家と議論。

	次々と打ち出されるトランプ大統領の関税政策が、世界で波紋を呼んでいる。世界はどこへ向かうのか、国際報道の新キャスターが、視聴者の声をもとに専門家と議論。今後の国際情勢を展望する。

title: 映像の世紀バタフライエフェクト　東ドイツ　監視国家　４１年の闇
description:
映像の世紀バタフライエフェクト　東ドイツ　監視国家　４１年の闇
[総合] 
2025年03月31日 午後10:00 〜 午後10:45 (45分)
社会主義国家東ドイツでは、治安維持組織「シュタージ」が国民を監視していた。国民の中に密告者を作り、子が親を、妻が夫を密告する。４１年で消えた国家のおぞましい闇。

	女子フィギュアで二度の金メダルを取った、東ドイツの国民的スター、カタリーナ・ヴィットは７歳の時から国家に監視されていた。西側への亡命を防ぐためだった。監視の目は一般市民にも向けられていた。国民の中に協力者を作り、要注意人物の行動を密告させていた。東ドイツのもう一つの闇は、ドーピング。研究機関は、綿密なプログラムを立て、検査をすり抜けられるように薬の使用法を定めていた。４１年で消えた国家の闇の記録。

title: 英雄たちの選択　ラストサムライ　謎多き新選組隊士　斎藤一
description:
英雄たちの選択　ラストサムライ　謎多き新選組隊士　斎藤一
[BS] 
2025年03月31日 午後9:00 〜 午後10:00 (1時間0分)
斎藤一は元新選組隊士。近藤勇が新政府軍に処刑されたのち隊長を引き継いだ剣の達人だが、その人生は謎に包まれていた。ラストサムライとして歩んだ数奇な運命をたどる。

	
	戊辰戦争のとき、新選組の近藤勇は、流山（千葉県）で、新政府軍につかまり、処刑されてしまう。そのあと、隊長に就任したのが、斎藤一だった。残された隊士を率いた斎藤一に迫られた選択は、会津藩に合流し新政府軍と戦うか、あるいは、旧幕府艦隊の榎本武揚とともに当時、仙台にいた土方歳三と合流するかだった。近年、その数奇な運命が明らかになりつつある。７２歳まで生き延びたラストサムライ・斎藤一の人生に迫る。

title: きょうの料理ビギナーズ　フレッシュに味わう　春キャベツ
description:
きょうの料理ビギナーズ　フレッシュに味わう　春キャベツ
[Ｅテレ] 
2025年03月31日 午後9:25 〜 午後9:30 (5分)
早春から初夏にかけて出回る春キャベツは、みずみずしくて、とっても柔らか。生のままでもおいしく味わえます。キャベツのせん切りもマスターして、もりもり食べましょう！

	「生キャベツのディップ添え」は、柔らかな春キャベツを、みそマヨネーズとチーズソースの２つの味でいただきます。どちらもちょっとコクがあって、みずみずしいキャベツにぴったりです。「春キャベツのオープンオムレツ」は、せん切りキャベツと卵を混ぜて小さめのフライパンいっぱいに流し、丸く焼き上げます。ふわふわの食感ですよ！

title: きょうの料理「春野菜をもりもり食べる！」　菜の花と厚揚げの炒め物
description:
きょうの料理「春野菜をもりもり食べる！」　菜の花と厚揚げの炒め物
[Ｅテレ] 
2025年03月31日 午後9:00 〜 午後9:25 (25分)
みずみずしい春野菜の魅力を引きだすおかずを伝える２日間。１日目は和食料理人の笠原将弘さんが、目からうろこの技を披露。春野菜プラスタンパク質のボリュームおかずです

	春野菜のみずみずしさを生かすプロの技は油脂を上手に使うこと。１品目は「菜の花と厚揚げの炒め物」。菜の花をしっかり炒めてほろ苦さと甘みを引き出し、油揚げを加えることでコクとボリュームをプラス！２品目は三陸の郷土料理からヒントを得た「わかじゃが」。旬のわかめをトロトロになるまで、新じゃがと一緒に煮ます。最初に炒めた豚バラがコクに。３品目は「春にんじんとしらすのしりしり」。やさしい味わいを楽しめます

title: きょうの健康　腰痛タイプ別の治療決定版　ぎっくり腰・椎間板ヘルニア　急な腰痛
description:
きょうの健康　腰痛タイプ別の治療決定版　ぎっくり腰・椎間板ヘルニア　急な腰痛
[Ｅテレ] 
2025年03月31日 午後8:30 〜 午後8:45 (15分)
日本腰痛学会の最新のデータでは腰痛に悩む人は７人にひとり！若い人にも突然起きるぎっくり腰と椎間板ヘルニアの起きる原因、最新治療や再発予防の運動を紹介する。

	若い人から高齢の方まで幅広い年代によく発症するのが、急に腰痛が起こる「ぎっくり腰」。また「腰椎椎間板ヘルニア」の人も、無理な動きをした際などに急な腰痛を起こす恐れがあるので要注意。急な腰痛は多くの場合、自然に炎症が治まり痛みもとれるが、痛みが長引き腰痛がくせになることもあるので要注意。使いやすい新しい薬も登場しているので早めに痛みをとりたい。痛みが軽くなったら適度に運動することも腰痛対策に効果的。

title: 鶴瓶の家族に乾杯　朝ドラ「あんぱん」高橋文哉が静岡県焼津市でマグロ漁船に！？
description:
鶴瓶の家族に乾杯　朝ドラ「あんぱん」高橋文哉が静岡県焼津市でマグロ漁船に！？
[総合] 
2025年03月31日 午後7:57 〜 午後8:42 (45分)
朝ドラ「あんぱん」に出演する高橋文哉が静岡県焼津市でぶっつけ本番旅！マグロやカツオのお刺身が大好物という高橋は鶴瓶と２人で、焼津がなぜマグロで有名なのかを探る。

	朝ドラ「あんぱん」に出演の高橋文哉が静岡県焼津市でぶっつけ本番旅！マグロやカツオのお刺身が大好物という高橋。鶴瓶に導かれ、焼津がなぜマグロで有名なのかを探る。まず訪れたのは小川（こがわ）港。冷蔵倉庫で働く男性や漁師さんたちからヒントをもらい、焼津の漁協へ向かう。次に漁師さんおススメの食堂を訪れる高橋と鶴瓶だが満席のため断念…。もう一軒の食堂へ向かおうとしたその時、鶴瓶の勘が働き、旅は急展開する！

title: 偉人の年収　Ｈｏｗ　ｍｕｃｈ？エンターテイナー　マイケル・ジャクソン（前編）
description:
偉人の年収　Ｈｏｗ　ｍｕｃｈ？エンターテイナー　マイケル・ジャクソン（前編）
[Ｅテレ] 
2025年03月31日 午後7:30 〜 午後8:00 (30分)
教科書に載るような偉人たちはいくら稼いでいたの？お金を切り口に半生をたどると、偉人の生き方や人生観が見えてくる！キング・オブ・ポップ　マイケル・ジャクソン登場！

	マイケル・ジャクソンの波乱に満ちた生涯を前・後編２週連続放送。前編は、貧しい黒人家庭に生まれたマイケルがジャクソン５で人気アイドルとなるも、ソロ活動を始めると人種の壁にぶつかり屈辱を味わうことに。マイケルは、黒人少年がストリートで編み出した技を習得し雪辱をかけた大舞台に挑みます。あの伝説のムーンウォーク誕生の瞬間をとらえた映像をまじえ、マイケルが“キング・オブ・ポップ”の称号を手にするまでの物語。

title: クローズアップ現代　＃私が退職した本当の理由　セクハラ対応　問われる企業・組織
description:
クローズアップ現代　＃私が退職した本当の理由　セクハラ対応　問われる企業・組織
[総合] 
2025年03月31日 午後7:30 〜 午後7:57 (27分)
フジテレビの問題をきっかけにＳＮＳ上にあふれたのは「会社のセクハラ対応に失望して退職した」という声…セクハラの訴えに対して企業・組織はどう向き合えばいいのか？

	「セクハラ対応」への意識が企業の間で高まるなか最前線で何が起きているのか？被害の訴えに対し「証拠がない」「同意があったのでは」として不認定とされた事例や企業の相談窓口で起きる二次被害の事例などから見えるのは組織が抱える様々な課題。そしてそれが退職へと向かわせてしまう実態だった。社会をアップデートしていけるのか。模索する企業の取り組みも紹介しながら私たちの足下から変えるためのヒントを探っていく。

title: 出川哲朗のクイズほぉ～スクール　ＱｕｉｚＫｎｏｃｋが出題！文房具のヒミツ

	出川たちはクイズに答えて“あした学校で話したくなる知恵”が書かれた「知恵の書」の獲得を目指す。出題されるクイズは小学校や中学校で学ぶことや、生活の中で体験したことをもとに、観察力・推理力をフル活用すれば答えがわかるものばかり。テレビの前であなたも挑戦！

title: [UFO-Raws][BDMV][株式会社マジルミエ] Kabushiki Gaisha Magilumiere [Vol.3]
description:
Color Corrected and Cropped Scans included @ 1200dpi.

[![](https://files.catbox.moe/4lipnf.png)](https://files.catbox.moe/yp3cr6.png)

### Random Release Fact

This BD had the latest and greatest "MKBv82" of BD, which MakeMKV didn't update for it. So this caused the decryption to fail. (Yes, I did email the tgz files)

Spent an afternoon finding keys and working out a flow for it. And thanks to the very fine folks of doom9 (special shoutout to candela) for sharing the DK, I managed to do it.

#### Other notes?

Seeing the re-encoded BDMVs from DBD-Raws was a welcome surprise... But...

*I felt a little let down that UFO-Raws wasn't credited as the source.*

I think it's a good practice to always acknowledge everyone's contributions... Perhaps someone forgot?

#### P.P.S.

[@Falloree BD Batch when](/?f=0&c=0_0&q=wakuwan+magilumiere)

*Completely automated release so expect occasional problems - Report issues and suggest improvements here or on discord.*

| [MediaInfo](https://rentry.co/2dw37qba/raw) | Source            |

**Enhancements automatically applied:**
- Main dialogue restyled to Gandhi-Sans styling
- Timing post processor applied to patch up Hidive's terrible timing, snap to keyframe, etc.
- Readable subtitles - Overlapping lines no longer shift positions when you're trying to read them
- Signs have their proper fonts ripped
- Hidive's small font style for alternative speakers moved to top of screen
- Detection to add basic song styling
- Overlapping main dialogue given blue outline to differentiate speakers
- Fixed signs displaying on top of dialogue
- Faux em-dashes converted to real ones
- Proper stutter (W-what?! -> Wh-What?!, S-s-s-subsplus -> S-S-S-Subsplus)
- Detect OP & ED chapters using animethemes api

---

**Comment:**

> Amazon Hidive hasn't been ripped yet and Amazon JP/Netflix are on a 3 day delay. Video sources could switch for next episode or for v2 if that is necessary.

I made the decision on this episode only, to adjust encoding settings to keep the episode size in-check and have a reason to have it. However the final visual result looks fine. description:
![img](https://i.imgur.com/w56NBQj.png)

# 📚 漫画EPUB情報＆ガイド / Manga EPUB Info & Guide

EPUBファイルは、PC・スマホ・メディアサーバーなど様々な方法で閲覧・変換できます。

---

## 📦 ファイル互換性と変換方法 / File Compatibility and Conversion

このEPUBは、[Komga](https://komga.org/) や [Kavita](https://www.kavitareader.com/) のようなメディアサーバーを含め、多くのリーダーで使用できます。

> **EPUBファイルは7-ZipまたはWinRARで開くことができます。**  
> ファイル名に `kcc-` が含まれている場合、ページ順は正しいです。  
> `image_rsrc` が含まれている場合、JPGに変換するには Calibre を使って EPUB → PDF → ZIP の順に変換してください。  
> ※ EPUBを直接ZIPに変換するとページ順が崩れる可能性があります。

📘 **日本語変換ガイド** – https://pastebin.com/8TTL9xJV  
📘 **English Conversion Guide** – https://pastebin.com/04XAsfps

---

## 🧰 Calibreとは？ / What is Calibre?

[Calibre](https://calibre-ebook.com/) は、無料で使える高機能な電子書籍管理ソフトです。  
EPUBやPDF、ZIPなどの形式変換やタグ編集、コレクション管理が可能です。  
Windows・macOS・Linuxに対応しています。

- Calibre公式サイト: https://calibre-ebook.com/

---

## 📱 EPUB対応アプリのおすすめ (無料) / Software Recommendations (Freeware)

**PC / Mac**  
- [Thorium](https://thorium.edrlab.org/en/) - 高速・軽量で右開き対応のEPUBビューア  
- [Calibre](https://calibre-ebook.com/) - 電子書籍の変換・管理も可能  

**iPhone**  
- [Books（Apple Books）](https://apps.apple.com/jp/app/apple-books/id364709193)

**Android**  
- [Readera](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=org.readera&hl=ja&gl=US)  
- [Google Play Books](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.google.android.apps.books&hl=ja&gl=US)  
- [Mihon](https://mihon.app/download/)

title: [HimawariNijiima] Boruto Sub Edits v2 (1-26, 181-188, 193-205, 219-230, 243-255)
description:
NOT MY RELEASE -- JUST THOUGHT I'D UPLOAD IT


These are edits of Himawari's subs for Boruto episodes 1-26, 181-188, 193-205, 219-230, and 243-255 that change the opening or ending subs in some way.
Episodes 1-13 replaces Himawari's (effectless) Opening 1 and Ending 1 karaoke with KamiFS's Opening 1 and Ending 1 karaoke, and Episodes 14-26 just replaces Himawari's Opening 1 karaoke with KamiFS's Opening 1 karaoke. (KamiFS only did the first 2 Boruto episodes, so they only karaoked Opening 1 and Ending 1.)
Episodes 181-188 replaces the karaoke for Ending 15 that was used in those episodes with the updated karaoke for Ending 15 used in Episodes 189-192.
Episodes 193-205 and 219-230 fix Endings 16 and 18: in the original Himawari subs, when those endings were played in some video players, or when you tried to hardcode them, the subs glitched (Ending 16's karaoke didn't show up at all and some lines or syllables were out of place in Ending 18's karaoke). This is because it was taken from an Arabic fansub and downscaled from 1080p to 720p wrong. In this version, I downscaled the karaoke from that Arabic fansub correctly so it wouldn't glitch when played in some video players or hardcoded.
Episodes 243-255 replaces Himawari's Ending 20 karaoke with Z-A's Ending 20 karaoke (Z-A is a Spanish fansub). I didn't like the font or lack of effects in the karaoke for Ending 20, so I replaced it with Z-A's karaoke for that same song instead, with Himawari's English translation used replacing Z-A's Spanish translation for that ending.
The tag is named after a character that I made for a Ranma 1/2 fanfiction (Himawari Nijiima). I used this name because the original group is called Himawari.

To add these subtitle files to an episode, just use mkvtoolnix or something similar to replace the original subtitle track of that episode with the subtitle track from this torrent. In addition, add the fonts from the folder 1-26 Fonts if that episode is inbetween Episodes 1 and 26, the folder 181-188 Fonts if that episode is inbetween 181 and 188, or the folder 243-255 Fonts if that episode is inbetween Episodes 243 and 255. (Inclusive, all 3 times.)

These subtitle tracks are meant for the original (non-BD) versions of Boruto episodes 1-26, 181-188, 193-205, and 219-230, and the BD versions of episodes 243-255. You can torrent 1-26, 181-188, 193-205, and 219-230 here: https://anidex.info/torrent/571808, and 243-255 here: https://nyaa.si/view/1863917. You can also direct download them here: https://www.tokyoinsider.com/anime/B/Boruto:_Naruto_Next_Generations_(TV)/.

Credits:
KFX (OP1, ED1) - KamiFS (Alkoon)
KFX/Song Styling (ED16, ED18) - zero-kon/AmmarAnimeSubs/Almighty (possibly Alkoon as well)
KFX/Song Styling (ED20) - Z-A
Karaoke Syncing - Me (Animogus)

description:
PP: deblock, dehalo, denoise, deband, regrain, crop
Audio and Subs taken from USDVD Bandai unchanged
[Source-Encode Comparison](https://slow.pics/c/y3DK1eZ4)

---

Very very low effort release that I made for a personal groupwatch that's starting in a few days. All existing releases were unwatchable garbage so I made one that sucks less. OVA should follow in a few days, though I cannot find any good source for the Spin-Off movie so don't hold your breath for that. This encode needs VFR handling and also this encode is overcropped (I added the same crop to other encodes in the comparison), but I had to do it because the crop changes dozens of times per episode and requires variable resolution really all of which I'm unwilling to figure out for a release of this scale. 

Chances that this release will ever be improved upon are slim anyway, so this 5% of effort to get 80% of the result should be good enough at least.

title: [neoDESU] That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime [Season 3 + Specials] [BD 1080p x265 HEVC OPUS AAC] [Dual Audio] Tensei shitara Slime Datta Ken | Tensura
description:
![](https://i.lensdump.com/i/6BKULK.png)
*Come hang out in **[Discord](https://discord.gg/47Q7FdB54e)***

#### **[That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime [Season 3]](https://myanimelist.net/anime/53580/Tensei_shitara_Slime_Datta_Ken_3rd_Season)**
#### **[That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime: Digression - Diablo's Journal [Special]](https://myanimelist.net/anime/58592/Tensei_shitara_Slime_Datta_Ken_3rd_Season__Kanwa_-_Diablo_Nikki)**
#### **[That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime: Digression - Luminous Memories [Special]](https://myanimelist.net/anime/59493/Tensei_shitara_Slime_Datta_Ken__Kanwa_-_Luminous_Memories)**

---

**Synopsis**
Rimuru Tempest is victorious following his climactic showdown with Demon Lord Clayman. With Diablo's aid, the war with the Falmuth Kingdom ends decisively in Rimuru's favor. Fueled by increased migration and the integration of Jura Forest, the nation of Tempest undergoes rapid growth.

Rimuru's victory shifts the balance of power, giving rise to a renewed period of peace—but whether that peace will last is another matter. Yuuki Kagurazaka and Kazalim are conspiring with the Harlequin Alliance to bring about Rimuru's downfall. Furthermore, the Western Holy Church continues its intolerant crusade against Rimuru and his non-human subordinates. Both allies and enemies engage in a battle of wits, carefully advancing their agendas without shattering the delicate status quo. But once the first domino inevitably falls, the race to supremacy begins.

![](https://b.l3n.co/i/omWjdm.png)

---

**Language Options**
I included two simple scripts that you can apply to these files to do the following (Windows/Linux):

1. Make [Single Audio] Japanese: Throws out *English audio* and *Signs&Songs subtitles* tracks
2. Make [Single Audio] English: Throws out *Japanese audio* and *Dialogue subtitles* tracks
	
To apply these put all the video files into the *Language Options* folder and run the corresponding script.
*Note for Linux: mkvtoolnix package must be installed*

---

**Source**
🗃️ Video and JP Audio (JP BDMV): **[Anonymous]**
🗃️ ENG Audio (WEB): **[[Yameii]](https://nyaa.si/view/1806507)**
🗃️ Subtitles: **[[Asakura]](https://nyaa.si/view/1953616)**

*Thank you all for making this possible <3*

BS-TBS

アンガールス田中＆山根がかつて空港があった街、広島市観音新町へ▽カープ＆サンフレ歴史の証人「県総合グランド」で出会った元赤ヘル戦士▽世界のモルテンの最新ラボ潜入

	広島県に暮らす「ひと」「まち」を巡り地域の魅力を再発見！毛利元就公の命を受けてアンガールズ田中卓志と山根良顕が広島の街を訪れる。

title: ＮＨＫスペシャル　新ジャポニズム第４集　ＤＥＳＩＧＮ世界を魅惑する“和”の魔法
description:
ＮＨＫスペシャル　新ジャポニズム第４集　ＤＥＳＩＧＮ世界を魅惑する“和”の魔法
[総合] 
2025年03月30日 午後9:00 〜 午後9:50 (50分)
日本のデザインに世界が注目している。ランドセル、折り紙、伝統的な金継ぎ…人々を惹きつけるのは何か。有名ブランドの担当者による日本各地の「宝探し」にも密着！

	世界が注目する日本カルチャーのうねりを読み解くシリーズ。今回は、ファッション、テクノロジー、建築など多くの分野で賞賛される日本のデザイン。アメリカの大人が買い求めるのはランドセル。美しさと機能性が人気だ。欧米では、壊れた器を漆や金で直す「金継ぎ」教室が大盛況。癒やしと勇気を与えられるという。日本各地で職人技を探す有名ブランドの調査にも密着。職人の手仕事、その技を伝え守る日本人の暮らしと思想に迫る。

title: ダーウィンが来た！「なぜ町へ！？ツキノワグマ大調査」
description:

[総合] 
2025年03月30日 午後7:30 〜 午後8:00 (30分)
ここ数年ニュースになっている「町に出てくるクマ」。なぜ町へ出てきたのか。被害の多い秋田県でクマにＧＰＳを着けて徹底調査。すると、知られざる暮らしぶりが明らかに！

	２０２３年秋、秋田でクマが大量出没。その数、例年のなんと３０倍。けが人も過去最多。人もクマも安心して暮らすために地元自治体と研究者、ダーウィンがチームを結成、初の行動調査に挑む！クマにＧＰＳ付き首輪カメラを着けると、人間顔負けの賢さ、そして、なるだけ人目を避けたいが、町に出ざるをえないクマの事情があることが明らかに。さらに、首輪カメラが捉えた食べ物を求めて大移動する驚きの身体能力にもご注目！

脂肪肝の治療の基本は、肥満が原因の場合は減量、お酒が原因の場合は禁酒。肝臓がんの肝動脈化学塞栓療法や焼しゃく療法、蛍光イメージング手術などについても紹介する。

	検査でＡＬＴという数値が高い場合は、脂肪肝を疑って早めに受診することが大切。脂肪肝は進行すると肝硬変や肝がんのリスクが高まる。治療の基本は、肥満が原因の場合は減量、お酒が原因の場合は禁酒。痩せていても脂肪肝になりやすい体質の人もいる。肝臓がんは自覚症状がほとんどないまま進行する。「肝動脈化学塞栓療法」や「焼しゃく療法」、がんを光らせる「蛍光イメージング手術」など、最新治療について専門医が解説。

description:

[総合]

究極の絶品カレー登場！プロも驚く狂気のアマチュアによるガチンコ対決！大学生、医者…出演者たちの人生がつまったカレーに思わず涙。サンドやタサン志麻絶賛のひと皿

	ルーはもちろんカレー粉も使わない。オリジナルなスパイス配合で唯一無二のカレーを作り上げる狂気のアマチュア！会社員や専門学校講師などさまざまな職業の出場者が、本業のかたわら趣味で磨き上げたレシピで激突。カレー道を突き進む者たちによる頂上決戦にサンドウィッチマン絶叫！伝説の家政婦タサン志麻、フレンチの巨匠・谷昇、カレー界の巨人・稲田俊輔、有澤まりこがジャッジ。人生がつまった絶品カレーをめしあがれ！

title: カラーで蘇（よみがえ）る二代目円歌
description:
カラーで蘇（よみがえ）る二代目円歌
[Ｅテレ] 
2025年03月30日 午後2:30 〜 午後3:00 (30分)
「古今亭志ん生」「三代目三遊亭金馬」に続く「落語名演カラー化プログラム」の第三弾。二代目三遊亭円歌の貴重な高座映像「更衣（ころもがえ）」をお届けする。

	新作落語「呼び出し電話」などで一世を風靡した人気落語家、二代目三遊亭円歌（１８９０－１９６４）。落語の映像は現存しないと思われてきたが、今回、ＮＨＫに一演目のみ残されていることが分かった。演目は、当時開催されていた落語台本懸賞募集の入選作、「更衣（ころもがえ）」。この貴重なフィルムをＡＩを用いカラー化する。番組では、弟子である四代目三遊亭歌笑と孫弟子にあたる立花家橘之助が映像を鑑賞し語り合う。

title: 日本の話芸　春風亭昇太　落語「不動坊」
description:
日本の話芸　春風亭昇太　落語「不動坊」
[Ｅテレ] 
2025年03月30日 午後2:00 〜 午後2:30 (30分)
春風亭昇太さんの落語「不動坊」をお送りします（令和７年２月２８日（金）千葉県袖ケ浦市民会館で収録）

	春風亭昇太さんの落語「不動坊」をお送りします（令和７年２月２８日（金）千葉県袖ケ浦市民会館で収録）【あらすじ】長屋に住む八っつぁんは大家さんから縁談を持ち掛けられた。相手は、急死した講釈師・不動坊火焔（ふどうぼう・かえん）の女房だった、おみつ。八っつぁんが小金をためているのを見込んで、不動坊が残した借金ともどもおみつと夫婦になってくれないかと言うのだ…

title: 地球ドラマチック　工場に潜入！二階建てバスのつくり方
description:
地球ドラマチック　工場に潜入！二階建てバスのつくり方
[Ｅテレ] 
2025年03月30日 午後1:15 〜 午後2:00 (45分)
ロンドンのシンボルになっている、真っ赤な二階建てバス。その製造工場にカメラが潜入！巨大なバスは一体どのようにしてつくられているのか。最新技術と熟練の技に迫る。

	１００年以上の歴史を誇る、名物の二階建てバス。なかでも、いま需要が急上昇しているのが完全電動型のバスだ。新型車両の製造工場に番組ナビゲーターが潜入！ネジ止めや塗装など、実際の組み立て作業を体験しながら、その魅力に迫る。さらに工場を飛び出し、誕生秘話を紐解いていく。その起源は古く、１９世紀の乗り合い馬車の時代にまで遡るという…。歴史ある二階建てバスの世界をとことん深堀りしていく（イギリス２０２１年）

title: 【ＮＨＫ地域局発】あわとく　徹底解剖！徳島と大阪・関西万博
description:

[総合] 
2025年03月29日 午前5:10 〜 午前5:37 (27分)
いよいよ４月から始まる大阪・関西万博。徳島県は四国で唯一となる常設ブースを設置する。その展示を羽深アナが体験。万博に向けた取り組みを徹底解剖する。

	いよいよ４月から始まる大阪・関西万博。徳島県は四国で唯一となる常設ブースを設置。そのコンセプトは、万博は「ゲートウェイ」、徳島「まるごとパビリオン」。万博会場はあくまでも入り口で、観光客に県内まで足をのばしてもらうのが狙いだ。番組では羽深アナが徳島ブースを体験。県内小学生と海外との国際交流やＳＤＧＳの取り組みまで、進む万博への準備を県内に暮らす外国人と見ていく。

title: [Half-Baked] The Apothecary Diaries Season 2 - 12 [WEB 1080p HEVC E-AC3] | Kusuriya no Hitorigoto - 36 | The Apothecary Diaries - S02E12
description:
PP: rescale (frac), deblock (scenefiltered OP), aa, denoise (scenefiltered OP/ED), deband, regrain (scenefiltered OP) 
Audio from Amazon, subs are modified Crunchyroll
[Source-Encode Comparison](https://slow.pics/c/4CINxmqy)

---

Low effort encode that I made for myself to watch. The OP is very grainy but completely starved on web sources, so I nuked it and added some new grain. For the ED I did not denoise the [intentionally noisy](https://slow.pics/c/BE4AMdXW) stills as to preserve artistic intent. Other than that it's pretty much the same script I used for the previous season. 

By the way if anyone wants to translate the songs into English feel free to contact me. Ping in GJM or QC server or whatever. 

Encode, "QC": Moelancholy
Styling, Timing, Typesetting: Nyarthur

title: Reincarnation of the Unrivalled Time Mage 001-025 as v01-06 (Digital-Compilation) (Oak-JXL) [JPEG-XL] [Complete]
description:
#### JPEG-XL VISUALLY LOSSLESS (-d 1.0) VERSION.

| Volumes | Resolution | Source | [Denoised](https://pastebin.com/ZeY9fqxW) | Leveled | Spreads | Posterized | Clean Raws |
|  :---------: | :------------: | :--------: | :---------------------------------------------------------: | :---------: | :---------: | :-------------: | :--------------: |
| 1-6 | x3071 | [Manga UP! Global App](https://global.manga-up.com/manga/57) | ✅ | N/A | ✅ | ❌ (JXL) | ✅ | 

*These compiled volumes include raw pages from the Japanese volumes to keep the page count and numbering correct for ‘complete’ tank-style volumes.*
- Color pages from the raw tanks are included as duplicated pages marked with [color] and [color offset] (Volumes 1-4 only).

----

***The JPEG-XL images are created from the denoised PNGs after converting from AVIF.***
To open JPEG-XL images your reading software need to support this, check [here](https://wotaku.wiki/guides/manga/jxl) for supported software.
Komga (and Kavita Canary) is able to open and serve JXL files, they will auto-convert if accessing (OPDS) application does not handle JXL.

----

Volumes 01-06 contain chapters 001-025, chapters only in Posterized PNG4: https://nyaa.si/view/1954180
Compiled tank-style volumes 01-06 of chapters 001-025 in Posterized PNG4: https://nyaa.si/view/1954181

title: Reincarnation of the Unrivalled Time Mage 001-025 (2022-2025) (Digital) (Oak) [Complete]
description:
Obtained directly from [Manga UP! Global](https://global.manga-up.com/manga/57).
[Converted and denoised](https://pastebin.com/ZeY9fqxW) x3071 **4-bit (16 Colors) PNG** images, split dual-pages are merged.

*All image filenames are tagged and have the correct page number, including dual-page images.*
- These chapters start with the left-side page first, start with a single page on dual-view readers for correct page order.
- These chapters have a title so the archives contain a titled chapter sub-folder.
- Split chapters by Manga UP! are bundled together as a complete chapter.

Este primer episodio es una prueba para ver cómo quedaba cuando he visto que no hay traducciones oficiales ni ningún fansub de España ha dado indicios de ponerse manos a la obra
Dejaría de realizar esta versión si en algún punto otro grupo fansub decente sube más episodios de los que lleve hechos o si existe una versión oficial en español, ya sea en Prime Video, Crunchyroll u otra. Me temo que lo primero es más posible que lo segundo
Hasta la próxima

title: [neoDESU] [v2] The 100 Girlfriends Who Really, Really, Really, Really, Really Love You [Season 1] [BD 1080p x265 HEVC OPUS AAC] [Dual Audio] Kimi no Koto ga Daidaidaidaidaisuki na 100-nin no Kanojo | Hyakkano
description:
![](https://i.lensdump.com/i/6BKULK.png)
*Come hang out in **[Discord](https://discord.gg/47Q7FdB54e)***

#### **[The 100 Girlfriends Who Really, Really, Really, Really, Really Love You [Season 1]](https://myanimelist.net/anime/54714/Kimi_no_Koto_ga_Daidaidaidaidaisuki_na_100-nin_no_Kanojo)**

---

**Notes:**
. Restyled script and changed fonts
. Created styled OP & ED with KFX
. Small adjustment on a couple signs
. Created chapters

*[v2]*
. Added missing ED into EP3
. Added special ED into EP11 (Oh yes, Rentaro-chan!)
. Added many signs tsed by animecenter and hatty

---

**Synopsis**
Rentarou Aijou has it all: looks, intelligence, athletic skill, and popularity with peers and mentors alike. Unfortunately, none of these qualities help Rentarou with his love life. On the day of his middle school graduation, he is once again turned down by a girl he confesses to, earning his one-hundredth rejection in a row. Down on his luck, he goes to a matchmaking shrine and wishes to finally get a girlfriend in high school.

When the god of the shrine suddenly appears before him, Rentarou is told he will meet an astronomical total of one hundred soulmates in high school. Though Rentarou initially does not take this foretelling seriously, his doubts disappear when, on the first day of school, he meets two of these soulmates—Hakari Hanazono and Karane Inda—who both confess to him. With fated encounters and love confessions galore, Rentarou's life is about to get a lot more exciting.

![](https://a.l3n.co/i/LJi4G5.png)

---

**Language Options**
I included two simple scripts that you can apply to these files to do the following (Windows/Linux):

1. Make [Single Audio] Japanese: Throws out *English audio* and *Signs&Songs subtitles* tracks
2. Make [Single Audio] English: Throws out *Japanese audio* and *Dialogue subtitles* tracks
	
To apply these put all the video files into the *Language Options* folder and run the corresponding script.
*Note for Linux: mkvtoolnix package must be installed*

***
Get [**DDL here**](https://animetosho.org/search?q=trix+av1+Medalist+batch) | **Medalist** [(MyAnimeList)](https://myanimelist.net/anime/55318/)
:---:|:---:|:---:
**Video Codec** | 1080p AV1 10-bit
**Subtitles** | English, English (Forced), English (SDH), French, Spanish (Latin), Spanish, German, Italian, Portuguese (Brazil), Portuguese, Chinese (Traditional), Czech, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Japanese, Japanese (SDH), Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Romanian, Slovak, Swedish
**Sources** | [varyg1001](https://nyaa.si/user/varyg1001?f=0&c=0_0&q=Medalist) (Video, Audio, Subs)
| | [More AV1 releases](https://nyaa.si/?f=0&c=0_0&q=AV1)
***
**Filtering: denoising, dehalo, debanding --> [SVT-AV1-PSY](https://github.com/psy-ex/svt-av1-psy): preset 3, CRF 28**

The entire release is not worth of the v2 moniker, but I still improved the track naming consistency, properties consistency, as well as adding better chapters. No Salchow subs yet cause they're not finished and they would be inconsistent with the Forced and SDH tracks, which some people may not like. 
You may know I'm working on [improving the french subs](https://nyaa.si/user/NekoTrix?f=0&c=1_3&q=Medalist) (E02 for soon BTW), you can expect a BD batch from me in the future with the v2 Salchow subs and *much* better encodes.
***
**Language Options**
You can [download here](https://mega.nz/folder/kcQhWZCA#c4wfvx2RXI9XN8XeBso09g) two scripts that do the following (Windows/macOS-Linux):

- *Keep Japanese*: Throws out all audio tracks other than Japanese
- *Keep English*: Throws out all audio and subtitles tracks other than English

Put all the video files into the *Language Options* folder and run the corresponding script. The resulting files can be found in the *output* folder.

Note: [MKVToolNix](https://mkvtoolnix.download/downloads.html) must be installed on your system
***
> **Tired of VLC acting up with Opus audio, with subtitles, with color rendition? We recommend the _MPV_ media player for the best playback experience ([guide](https://thewiki.moe/guides/playback/)). Keep your software up-to-date!**

**Год выхода:** 2025

**Перевод  #1:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [Dream Cast](https://dreamerscast.com/)

**Описание:**
Четырнадцать воинов отправлены императором для выполнения опаснейшей миссии. Трое погибли в пути. Ещё четверо были убиты за то, что якобы предали императора. Но последнее было ложью семи оставшихся в живых воинов, которые хотели присвоить все почести себе. Они с триумфом вернулись в столицу, где их назвали «Семь героев». Они пользовались уважением жителей империи и заняли высокое положение. Но один из считавшихся мёртвыми воинов выжил. Изменив внешность и имя, спустя годы он вернулся отомстить.

**Дополнительная информация:**
Тёмное фэнтези - редкий зверь в нашем рационе, а тут еще и по уважаемому первоисточнику, я уверен тайтл нас не разочарует и станет одним из самых лучшим в этом году. Кровь, насилие, месть, предательства - все атрибуты жанра на месте. Аниме выходит на At-x раньше чем на остальных сервисах - поэтому есть версия без цензуры R17 (и из за сцен насилия и из за сцен с бубами)

title: [MonitieRaws] Doraemon (2005) - 856 (EX 1920x1080 H264 AAC).mp4
description:
## 856 | イメージガム && 45年後......

***

***
It's been a long time since my last upload. This comeback time, I used NVEncC for encoding, so I’m not sure what to call it in the title… It’s not x264 or x265… ‘NVEncC’ sounds too long, so I just wrote H264. If you know the exact way to name it, let me know! ^^

**Subtitles** are included in the MP4 file (sorry, I forgot to use .mkv this time—I’ll use it in future encodes). You can use ffmpeg or alternative programs to extract them. ^^

Or, if you just want to watch the video with subtitles, simply open it in MPC-HC or VLC and select the subtitle track.

Here’s [My Discord Server](https://discord.gg/jPM2yWBd) — you can message me if you have any issues with the download or the video source.

My encoding settings: CQP 22 + GOP length 90.

***

title: BOCCHI THE ROCK! Recap Part 1 - (BD Remux 1080p H.264 FLAC.DTS-HD MA.AC-3)-realpinkgirl321
description:
Cross-post from other trackers.

This is just a simple remux of the BD with CR subs. There is no additional typesetting work like the [series release](https://nyaa.si/view/1949543) had.
Available subtitle languages are English, Latin-American Spanish, and French in ASS format. The Japanese captions in PGS from the Blu-ray are also included.

Main program audio is in stereo FLAC and 5.1ch DTS-HD MA.
There is a commentary track (192 kbps AC3), but no subs for it.

title: [VCB-Studio] 煋红 / MARS RED 10-bit 1080p HEVC BDRip [Fin]
description:
![POSTER_800.webp](https://img.2222.moe/images/2025/03/26/POSTER_800.webp)  
  
煋红 / MARS RED BDRip  
  
震惊于原盘线条一圈又一圈的缩放振铃，被硬控无法评价画质。处理：去色带、抗锯齿、补偿性锐化、基于神经网络的组合去振铃、自适应降噪。  
Shocked by the scaling ringing along the lines round and round, I'm hard CC'd and can no longer comment on the image quality. PP: de-banding, anti-aliasing, compensatory sharpening, combinatorial de-ringing based on neural network algorithm, and adaptive denoising.  
  

* * *

title: [CRUCiBLE] High-Rise Invasion Season 1 (S01) (BD Remux 1080p FLAC H.264) [Dual Audio] | Tenkuu Shinpan
description:
| Sources Used       | JPBD｜neoDESU｜XEBEC       |
| :-------------: |:-------------: |
| Video      | 1080p H.264 |
| Primary Audio     | Japanese FLAC 2.0     |
| Secondary Audio     | English FLAC 2.0    |
| Subtitles | neoDESU｜Netflix    |
| Mediainfo | [MaskDex](https://rentry.org/MaskDex)      |


___
> ***• Video, Japanese Audio from JPN Disc.***
> ***• English Dub from NF.***
> ***• Subtitles from neoDESU & NF.***

___
There’s no USBD for this show, so the next best option for the English dub is Netflix’s version in xHE-AAC format. That left me with three choices:

1. Keep the xHE-AAC track as it is – but xHE-AAC is barely supported by media players, so that option was a no-go.
2. Convert it to a more common lossy format (like max qaac) – This would’ve fixed the compatibility problem, but it would’ve been a lossy-to-lossy transcode. It’s fine in some cases, but since this is a remux, I decided to go with the next option.
3. Convert it to a more common lossless format (FLAC) – This would solve the compatibility issue without any more loss. It does make the file bigger, though. 

TLDR: The **English audio** is a *lossy-to-lossless* transcode of Netflix's xHE-AAC, just in a more compatible and *lossless container*. I repeat, the english audio is still **LOSSY**.
___
**Retag police may refer to the AB upload description for eac3to logs**

title: [❀拨雪寻春❀] 四月是你的谎言 / 四月は君の嘘 / Shigatsu wa Kimi no Uso / Your Lie in April [BDRip][HEVC-10bit 1080p][简繁日内封][Rev.]
description:
**本组作品发布于：[acg.rip](https://acg.rip/team/169)｜[dmhy.org](https://share.dmhy.org/topics/list/team_id/823)｜[bangumi.moe](https://bangumi.moe/tag/61b5cfc72525b000079c7423)｜[acgnx.se](https://share.acgnx.se/team-106-1.html)｜[nyaa.si](https://nyaa.si/user/Mekozoko)**

**❀拨雪寻春❀  
四月是你的谎言**

・四月是你的谎言是新川直司先生于2011年5月开始连载的漫画，动画则于2014年10月开始播出。然而那段岁月对我们而言只有奋笔疾书，未能和当年的观者一起追番着实令人遗憾。可即便在10多年后的现在，熏和公生的故事仍然感动着一批又一批观者。每当樱花飞舞的四月到来时，我们都会不自觉地想起那位小提琴手，想起她用生命叙写的最美的谎言。  
  
・可还记得本作第11、21和22话的title：命の灯、雪、春風。  
・当这几个意象偶然与诗词重叠起来时，就有了这样的总结：她若没有烧灯续昼，他又何以拨雪寻春？  
・于是在Ｍ问Ｎ打算为发布组取什么名字时，Ｎ不假思索地答道：“拨雪寻春。"

#### 修正履历：

*   （2022-06-17）修正ep19 cht ver.的时间轴错位
*   （2024-12-22）修正错字、错译（ep03，07，09，13，15，16，17，22）
*   （2024-12-22）修正时轴、样式（ep19）
*   （2025-03-30）重新封装发布（仅基于反馈修正了错字/错译/错轴，未全面排查译法/表述上的瑕疵）

#### Subtitle Staff：

*   翻译：萬福｜雨曝し
*   校对：火树银花
*   繁化：一星
*   后期：混乱怪魔
*   压制：愚人节

#### 结语：

乐声、春光、斜阳，美景良辰，一如既往，  
萤火、醉月、稜桥，你已远去，空自留香。  
他仍在细数与你的过往，  
用目光遥寄那语挚情长。

❀拨雪寻春❀  
2022年6月初｜2025年3月底

#### 权属声明：

*   本字幕由 **[❀拨雪寻春❀](https://www.haruhana.org)** 基于 **[AGPLv3通用协议](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/agpl-3.0.html)** 进行许可；
*   你可以：共享、演绎；
*   你应当：署名、非商业性使用、以相同方式共享。
